description: Two complementary dither catalogs: hand-painted patterns (binary tiles you stencil into a sprite) and perceptual kernels (Bayer + error-diffusion for image quantization).

entries.name: Binary tile patterns
entries.description: Hand-painted pixel-art dither tiles. 14 patterns including checker, diagonal hatch, brick offset, scales, stipple, waves.

entries.name: Perceptual dither kernels
entries.description: Bayer 2x2/4x4/8x8/16x16 ordered + Floyd-Steinberg, JJN, Stucki, Burkes, Sierra-Lite, Atkinson error-diffusion kernels.

guidance_quick.want_visible_pattern: Use kernels.ordered.bayer_4x4 or hand-paint a patterns.checker_2.
guidance_quick.want_pixel_art_crisp: kernels.error_diffusion.atkinson preserves blacks/whites, classic pixel-art look.
guidance_quick.want_artistic_shading: patterns.diagonal_left or patterns.cross_hatch placed by hand.
